log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Minotaur — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Minotaur — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Minotaur — Bardic Musician HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Minotaur — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
--- Minotaur — Bardic Musician --- HP: 32/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
